name: The Micro-Helper
judgingCriteria: Does it work without errors?
Is the core feature complete and polished?
Can you demo it in under 60 seconds?
Is the UI intuitive without instructions?
Would you actually use this tool?

name: The No-JavaScript Challenge
judgingCriteria: Is there absolutely zero JavaScript?
Does it have meaningful interactivity?
Is the CSS well-organized and modern?
Does it work across modern browsers?
Is the design visually appealing?

name: The CLI Champion
judgingCriteria: Does it run without a GUI?
Is the terminal output clear and readable?
Does it handle errors gracefully?
Is the --help documentation useful?
Would developers actually use this?

name: The Mobile-First Mandate
judgingCriteria: Does it work perfectly on mobile first?
Are all interactive elements touch-friendly?
Can you use it with one hand?
Is the content readable on small screens?
Does it enhance gracefully for larger screens?

name: The Productivity Booster
judgingCriteria: Does it solve a real productivity problem?
Would it actually save time over manual work?
Is it fast and responsive to use?
Is the workflow intuitive?
Would you use it daily?

name: The Accessibility Hero
judgingCriteria: Can you navigate everything with keyboard only?
Does it work with a screen reader?
Do colors meet contrast requirements?
Is the HTML semantic and properly labeled?
Would people with disabilities prefer this?

name: The Developer Tool
judgingCriteria: Does it solve a real developer problem?
Is the output accurate and useful?
Does it handle errors well?
Would you add it to your bookmarks?
Is it better than existing alternatives?

name: The Data Visualizer
judgingCriteria: Does it accept and parse data correctly?
Is the visualization clear and readable?
Does interactivity add value?
Would this help someone understand data?
Is it visually appealing?

name: The API Mashup
judgingCriteria: Does it meaningfully combine 2+ APIs?
Is the combination creative and useful?
Does it handle API failures well?
Is the data integration smooth?
Would the mashup be useful to others?

name: The Local-First App
judgingCriteria: Does it work without a backend?
Is data persisted across sessions?
Does it work offline?
Is the data management reliable?
Would you trust it with your data?

name: The Real-Time Experience
judgingCriteria: Does it update in real-time?
Is the latency imperceptible?
Does it feel smooth and responsive?
Are updates handled gracefully?
Would you want to use it over static alternatives?

name: The Game Jam Mini
judgingCriteria: Is it actually playable and fun?
Are the rules clear without explanation?
Is there a clear win/lose state?
Would you play it more than once?
Is the game loop satisfying?
